narrative: No benchmarking study for the new intercompany services contract. Embedded royalty in cost-plus arrangement without IP economic ownership analysis. Captive insurance company with only one insured + no risk transfer documented. Limited-risk distributor in France has been loss-making for 3 consecutive years with negative margins. Cash pooling: subsidiaries receive 0% on deposits. No Master File prepared. No Local File for Q3 transactions. Country-by-Country Report filing gap for FY2024. Hard-to-value intangible (algorithmic trading model) transferred without ex-post adjustment provision. Effective tax rate in Bermuda subsidiary below 15% with no top-up tax computed. Dependent agent risk in Germany not exempted. Intercompany loan with no credit rating documented.
